name: Burned at the Steak Marinade
recipeInstructions:
1. Make the Italian dressing and set aside.
2. In a small saucepan, boil water and blanch (for 2 minutes) the habaneros. Remove from heat and cut off stems.
3. Remove seeds from one pepper but save seeds from one of the peppers.
4. Place the peppers in a blender and add all other ingredients. Blend until well combined.
5. Coat the steaks generously with the marinade. Marinate for 3-4 hours.
6. Grill over hot charcoal fire. Be cautious of the heat.
